_comment: Intent exemplars for Tier 2 semantic intent classification. Each key is an intent label. Each value is a list of representative queries that best capture that intent. Add or extend intents here — no code changes required.
conceptual: What happens if I miss an exam?
Can I retake a course I failed?
What is the minimum attendance requirement to sit the final exam?
How do I appeal an incorrect or unfair grade?
What is the policy for plagiarism and academic misconduct?
Is there a make-up exam if I miss the scheduled test?
Can I defer my semester due to a medical emergency?
What are the rules for group assignment submissions?
What is the consequence of failing two subjects in one term?
How many times can I repeat a failed course?
informational: What is the hostel fee per semester?
How much is the annual tuition fee for the B.Tech programme?
What merit scholarship is available for undergraduate students?
Which companies came for campus recruitment this year?
What is the average salary package offered during placement?
How much financial aid is available for low-income students?
What is the fee for a double occupancy hostel room?
Are there any need-based grants for students?
What is the hostel curfew timing on weekdays?
What are the visiting hours for hostel guests?
procedural: How do I apply for a leave of absence from university?
What is the process to change my department or major?
How do I register for the campus placement season?
What documents are required for the scholarship application?
How do I access digital library resources from home?
What is the procedure to get an official fee receipt?
How do I submit a re-evaluation request for my exam?
What steps do I follow to appeal a grade?
How do I report an incident of academic misconduct?
Where can I book a counselling appointment at the wellness centre?
